method: Membrane-profile measurement reported in the source paper.
operating_conditions: Reported approximately 1.5 um thermally grown SiO2 square membrane with approximately 506.7 um side length after release from a silicon frame.
review_notes: Literature-transcribed central deflection; raw profile data are not stored in this repository.

uncertainty.basis: Source-reported uncertainty for the transcribed central deflection; not an independent metrology certificate.
